div.p: Header Checksum Scope: Covers first 24 bytes (0x00–0x17). The checksum fields themselves (0x18–0x1F) are excluded. Salts bind every frame in this WAL to this specific header.
Only frames up to the last valid Commit Frame are recovered. db_size at commit specifies how many pages the DB file contains after this transaction is applied.

ol.li: Initialize with previous state (or 0 for header).
Sum 8 bytes (page_num, db_size) as uint32 pairs.
Resulting (ck1, ck2) stored in frame header.

div.p: Note: Salts (0x08–0x0F) are NOT checksummed inside the frame.

g.text: [0x0C – 0x0F] checkpoint_seq: uint32 BE | Incremented each checkpoint
[0x10 – 0x13] salt1: uint32 BE | Random for current WAL generation
[0x14 – 0x17] salt2: uint32 BE | Random for current WAL generation
[0x18 – 0x1B] checksum1: uint32 BE | Cumulative cksum of bytes 0x00–0x17
[0x1C – 0x1F] checksum2: uint32 BE | Cumulative cksum of bytes 0x00–0x17
[0x00 – 0x03] page_number: uint32 BE | Target DB page ID
[0x04 – 0x07] db_size: uint32 BE | COMMIT marker if > 0 (Size of DB in pages)
[0x08 – 0x0B] salt1: uint32 BE | Must match WAL Header salt1
[0x0C – 0x0F] salt2: uint32 BE | Must match WAL Header salt2
[0x10 – 0x13] checksum1: uint32 BE | Running total cksum1
[0x14 – 0x17] checksum2: uint32 BE | Running total cksum2
